Events

We host regular hackathons, workshops, and meetups for high schoolers across Kerala. Come build something cool with us!

Upcoming

Campfire Kerala

A weekend of building, learning, and community sitting around a digital campfire.

Completed

Daydream Kerala

A 24-hour hackathon where your wildest ideas come to life.

Hack Club Kerala

A community of high schoolers in Kerala building and shipping cool things. Part of the global Hack Club network.
